calendar.matters:
Petition For Discharge Of Trustees
Off Calendar Oct-17-2007 Granted Per Written Order

Petition To Appoint Successor Trustee
Off Calendar May-30-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Henry Shain appearing for petitioners. Nancy Rasch appearing as guardian ad litem Mrs. Reeves. Court is dispensing with notice to Gina Spencer. Ms. Rasch is recommending this petition be granted. The petitioners has Mrs. Reeves best interest in mind. Ms. Rasch is willing to waive bond for Mrs. Reeves. Petition is granted. Bond is fixed in the amount of $60,000.00. Order signed. Ms. Rasch can apply for discharge and for fees. Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR 11722. Clerk: Ella Yip.

Petition To Appoint Successor Trustee
Off Calendar May-23-2006 Continued To May-30-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
